titleStmt.title: SII 23.450: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 450. (A.R. No. 450 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Lakshmīnārāyaṇa temple—on the same wall [Jaṭ.] Kulaśēkhara I: year 2: 1191-92 A.D.

summary.p: The introduction commences with the words Pūdalavaṉidai. This is damaged. It seems to register a gift of land made by Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ alias Toṇḍaimāṉ mentioned above to the temple through the mahāsabhā and the Paṇṇaiśeyvār of Arikēsarinallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīsvasti . pūtalavaṉitai metakaviḷaṅka mantaramārpiṉi lintira ṉiruppa puyalvarai taḻuviya vayamakaḷ cuḷippa mayaluṟu ciṟappiṉ māmuṉi viya licai nāṭaka meḻil peṟa vaḷara viñciṉaṅ kūṟa matakaḷiṟtta veñ ciṉaveṅkai patikkaṭu paṭuttuc cakkarañcella pauvamāṉila pārttivarpotuvaṟat teyva
viḷaiyāṭa veṉṟu purineñcattu Iruvakaip piṟappiṉ muṉṉūl mār piṉ nālmaṟaiyāḷar mātakavicumpiṉ vāṉavaṟkkamaitta yākave toṟu muyala Aṉalan kaṭakku marumai caṉṟulavum maṟuvakai ccempo ruḷccamai tirunilavu corinta virunivaṟaippi
kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa veṇperuñcikara mātira veṇkoṭṭu yeṇperuṅkaḷiṟiṉum yicaimakaḷā reṟivoṉpatu kaṇṭat ven tarum vaṉpuṭaṉ vaṇaṅki yaruntiṟaikāṭṭi yaṇitaṭa muṭimelaṭimalar muṭicūṭi vaḷaṅkeḻu kavari cer
paṭa kaṭavuḷmeṉi kaṟpputtiḻavuṭaṉ muṭicūṭi vulakam poṟṟa cerumali tāṉaipparippuraventar Āṭakatoḷum māramum piriyā makaḷirt tilataṅkaḷ mel cevaṭivaikum vulakamutuviṉi m viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmatikkulam viḷakkiya
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cikulacekaradevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2vatu Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam Arikecarinallūr mahāsabhaiyum paṇ �ṉa tirunila kaṇṭaṉṉāṉa toṇṭaimāṉ cittirai mātattu pa yivvūrp perunāṉ kellaikku
yiṟaiyiṟukkakkaṭava nilaṅkaḷum toṭṭaṅkaḷukkum puñcaikaḷukkum patiṉeṭṭaṭi kolāl nilam moru māvil muntirikaiyāl va kku candrādityavaṟc celvatāka dāṉam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ yivūr paṇṇaiceyvārum veliceyvārkku puṉṉūr ma ṭaiyāṉ tirunila kaṇṭaṉāṉa toṇ
Digital edition of SII 23.450 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
